title: DeepSeek-V4-Flash means LLM steering is interesting again
author: Hacker News (Best)
summary: The release of DeepSeek-V4-Flash has reignited interest in LLM steering techniques, suggesting that its architecture or capabilities enable new ways to control and guide model behavior. This development points to a shift in how researchers approach alignment and output customization, making steering methods both more practical and impactful.
